HistoryQuery2.Question: Podaj za ile dni urodziny: -1,0,1 itp
HistoryQuery2.Title: Urodziny

Query2.Title: Urodziny w wybranym dniu
Query2.Text: SELECT c.Id, c.DateOfBirth, day(c.DateOfBirth) FROM [Customer].[Customer] c WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE c.Status = 1 AND c.DateOfBirth IS NOT NULL AND ( ( MONTH(c.DateOfBirth) = MONTH(DATEADD(DAY, {0}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))) AND DAY(c.DateOfBirth) = DAY(DATEADD(DAY, {0}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))) ) OR ( MONTH(c.DateOfBirth) = 2 AND DAY(c.DateOfBirth) = 29 AND MONTH(DATEADD(DAY, {0}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))) = 2 AND DAY(DATEADD(DAY, {0}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))) = 28 AND YEAR(DATEADD(DAY, {0}, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))) % 4 <> 0 ) ) ORDER BY 3 DESC
